name: positioning-workshop
description: Evidence-first positioning workshop for founders, PMM, and GTM teams.

interface.shortDescription: Run a structured market-positioning session with evidence and hard tradeoffs.
interface.longDescription: Guides a team through source review, competitor mapping, forced strategic choices, alignment, and final messaging outputs.
defaultPrompt: Run a positioning workshop for our product.
Audit competitors and find our best wedge.
Turn founder answers into a sharp market position.
